spec.rawSql:
IF EXISTS(
    SELECT 1
    FROM sys.dm_tran_active_snapshot_database_transactions AS ast
    JOIN sys.dm_tran_active_transactions AS at ON at.transaction_id = ast.transaction_id
    JOIN sys.dm_exec_sessions AS ses ON ses.session_id = ast.session_id
    JOIN sys.dm_exec_connections AS con ON con.session_id = ses.session_id
)
BEGIN
    SELECT TOP 10 
        ses.session_id AS [SesionID],
        DB_NAME(ses.database_id) AS [Base de Datos],
        ses.login_name AS [Usuario],
        ses.program_name AS [Programa de Origen],
        ses.status AS [Estatus],
		FORMAT(at.transaction_begin_time, 'dd/MM/yy  -  HH:mm:ss') AS [Inicio],
        CASE 
			WHEN DATEDIFF(SECOND, at.transaction_begin_time, GETDATE()) < 60 THEN 1
			ELSE DATEDIFF(MINUTE, at.transaction_begin_time, GETDATE()) 
		END AS [Minutos Activa],
        con.client_net_address AS [IP del Cliente],
        ses.host_name AS [Host],
        ISNULL(t.text, '-') AS [Consulta SQL]
    FROM sys.dm_tran_active_snapshot_database_transactions AS ast
    JOIN sys.dm_tran_active_transactions AS at ON at.transaction_id = ast.transaction_id
    JOIN sys.dm_exec_sessions AS ses ON ses.session_id = ast.session_id
    JOIN sys.dm_exec_connections AS con ON con.session_id = ses.session_id
    LEFT JOIN sys.dm_exec_requests r ON ses.session_id = r.session_id
    OUTER APPLY sys.dm_exec_sql_text(r.sql_handle) AS t
    WHERE ast.elapsed_time_seconds > 5
    and ses.login_name != 'MICOOPE\femgatica'
    ORDER BY at.transaction_begin_time 

END
ELSE
BEGIN 
    SELECT 
        '' AS [SesionID],
        '' AS [Base de Datos],
        '' AS [Usuario],
        '' AS [Programa de Origen],
        '' AS [Estatus],
        '' AS [Inicio],
        '' AS [Minutos Activa],
        '' AS [IP del Cliente],
        '' AS [Host],
        '' AS [Consulta SQL]
END

SELECT 
    SUM(row_count) AS Total_Registros
FROM sys.dm_db_partition_stats
WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('FBNK_EB_GT01_SMS_SERVICIO')
AND index_id < 2;

SELECT
  GETDATE() as time,
  CAST(ips.avg_fragmentation_in_percent AS DECIMAL(5,2)) as value,
  'F_RECORD_LOCK' as metric
FROM sys.dm_db_index_physical_stats(
    DB_ID(), 
    OBJECT_ID('F_RECORD_LOCK'), 
    NULL, 
    NULL, 
    'LIMITED'
) AS ips
WHERE ips.index_id = 1

SELECT
	COUNT(*) AS 'No Enviados'
FROM FENANC.dbo.FBNK_EB_GT01_SMS_SERVICIO
WHERE XMLRECORD.value('(/row/c24)[1]', 'NVARCHAR(50)') = 'NO.ENVIADO';

SELECT
	COUNT(*) AS 'No Enviados'
FROM FENANC.dbo.FBNK_EB_GT01_SMS_SERVICIO
WHERE XMLRECORD.value('(/row/c24)[1]', 'NVARCHAR(50)') = 'ENVIADO';

IF EXISTS(
    SELECT 1
    FROM sys.dm_tran_active_snapshot_database_transactions AS ast
	  JOIN sys.dm_tran_active_transactions AS at ON at.transaction_id = ast.transaction_id
	  JOIN sys.dm_exec_sessions AS ses ON ses.session_id = ast.session_id
	  JOIN sys.dm_exec_connections AS con ON con.session_id = ses.session_id
	  LEFT JOIN sys.dm_exec_requests r ON ses.session_id = r.session_id
	  OUTER APPLY sys.dm_exec_sql_text(r.sql_handle) AS t
		where con.client_net_address = '10.138.7.92'
)
BEGIN
	SELECT 
	  ses.session_id AS [SesionID],
	  DB_NAME(ses.database_id) AS [Base de Datos],
	  ses.login_name AS [Usuario],
	  ses.program_name AS [Programa de Origen],
    ses.status AS [Estatus],
		FORMAT(at.transaction_begin_time, 'dd/MM/yy  -  HH:mm:ss') AS [Inicio],
	  CASE 
			WHEN DATEDIFF(SECOND, at.transaction_begin_time, GETDATE()) < 60 THEN 1
			ELSE DATEDIFF(MINUTE, at.transaction_begin_time, GETDATE()) 
		END AS [Minutos Activa],
	  con.client_net_address AS [IP del Cliente],
	  ses.host_name AS [Host],
	  ISNULL(t.text, '-') AS [Consulta SQL]
	FROM sys.dm_tran_active_snapshot_database_transactions AS ast
	  JOIN sys.dm_tran_active_transactions AS at ON at.transaction_id = ast.transaction_id
	  JOIN sys.dm_exec_sessions AS ses ON ses.session_id = ast.session_id
	  JOIN sys.dm_exec_connections AS con ON con.session_id = ses.session_id
	  LEFT JOIN sys.dm_exec_requests r ON ses.session_id = r.session_id
	  OUTER APPLY sys.dm_exec_sql_text(r.sql_handle) AS t
	WHERE --ast.elapsed_time_seconds > 5 AND 
		con.client_net_address = '10.138.7.92'
	ORDER BY at.transaction_begin_time 
END
ELSE
BEGIN 
    SELECT 
        '' AS [SesionID],
        '' AS [Base de Datos],
        '' AS [Usuario],
        '' AS [Programa de Origen],
    		'' AS [Estatus],
        '' AS [Inicio],
        '' AS [Minutos Activa],
        '' AS [IP del Cliente],
        '' AS [Host],
				'' AS [Consulta SQL]
END

IF EXISTS(
    SELECT 1
    FROM sys.dm_tran_active_snapshot_database_transactions AS ast
	  JOIN sys.dm_tran_active_transactions AS at ON at.transaction_id = ast.transaction_id
	  JOIN sys.dm_exec_sessions AS ses ON ses.session_id = ast.session_id
	  JOIN sys.dm_exec_connections AS con ON con.session_id = ses.session_id
	  LEFT JOIN sys.dm_exec_requests r ON ses.session_id = r.session_id
	  OUTER APPLY sys.dm_exec_sql_text(r.sql_handle) AS t
		where ses.login_name  != 'FENASER'
)
BEGIN
	SELECT 
	  ses.session_id AS [SesionID],
	  DB_NAME(ses.database_id) AS [Base de Datos],
	  ses.login_name AS [Usuario],
	  ses.program_name AS [Programa de Origen],
    ses.status AS [Estatus],
		FORMAT(at.transaction_begin_time, 'dd/MM/yy  -  HH:mm:ss') AS [Inicio],
	  CASE 
			WHEN DATEDIFF(SECOND, at.transaction_begin_time, GETDATE()) < 60 THEN 1
			ELSE DATEDIFF(MINUTE, at.transaction_begin_time, GETDATE()) 
		END AS [Minutos Activa],
	  con.client_net_address AS [IP del Cliente],
	  ses.host_name AS [Host],
	  ISNULL(t.text, '-') AS [Consulta SQL]
	FROM sys.dm_tran_active_snapshot_database_transactions AS ast
	  JOIN sys.dm_tran_active_transactions AS at ON at.transaction_id = ast.transaction_id
	  JOIN sys.dm_exec_sessions AS ses ON ses.session_id = ast.session_id
	  JOIN sys.dm_exec_connections AS con ON con.session_id = ses.session_id
	  LEFT JOIN sys.dm_exec_requests r ON ses.session_id = r.session_id
	  OUTER APPLY sys.dm_exec_sql_text(r.sql_handle) AS t
	WHERE --ast.elapsed_time_seconds > 5 AND 
		ses.login_name  != 'FENASER'
	ORDER BY at.transaction_begin_time 
END
ELSE
BEGIN 
    SELECT 
        '' AS [SesionID],
        '' AS [Base de Datos],
        '' AS [Usuario],
        '' AS [Programa de Origen],
				'' AS [Estatus],
        '' AS [Inicio],
        '' AS [Minutos Activa],
        '' AS [IP del Cliente],
        '' AS [Host],
				'' AS [Consulta SQL]
END

options.content: Servidor Base de Datos 231

spec.rawSql:
WITH CPU_Stats AS (
    SELECT  
        total_worker_time / execution_count AS AvgCPU,
        execution_count,
        total_worker_time AS TotalCPU,
        text AS Consulta
    FROM sys.dm_exec_query_stats 
    CROSS APPLY sys.dm_exec_sql_text(sql_handle)
)
SELECT TOP 5
    Consulta,
    (TotalCPU * 100.0 / SUM(TotalCPU) OVER()) AS 'Porcentaje CPU'
FROM CPU_Stats
ORDER BY 'Porcentaje CPU' DESC;

IF EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.dm_exec_requests WHERE blocking_session_id <> 0)
BEGIN
    SELECT 
        -- 1. INFORMACIÓN DE LA SESIÓN BLOQUEADA (La víctima)
        r.session_id AS 'Sesion Bloqueada',
        s_blocked.login_name AS 'Usuario Bloqueado',
        s_blocked.host_name AS 'Servidor Bloqueado',
        s_blocked.program_name AS 'App Bloqueada',
        DB_NAME(r.database_id) AS 'Base de Datos',
        CAST(r.wait_time / 1000.0 AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS 'Segundos Activa',
        r.wait_type AS 'Tipo de Espera',
        LEFT(t_blocked.text, 200) AS 'Consulta Bloqueada',

        -- 2. INFORMACIÓN DE LA SESIÓN BLOQUEADORA (El responsable)
        r.blocking_session_id AS 'Sesion Bloqueadora',
        s_blocker.login_name AS 'Usuario Bloqueador',
        s_blocker.host_name AS 'Servidor Bloqueador',
        s_blocker.program_name AS 'App Bloqueadora',
        s_blocker.status AS 'Estado Bloqueador',
        LEFT(t_blocker.text, 200) AS 'Ultima Consulta Bloqueador'

    FROM sys.dm_exec_requests r
    -- Unimos con sesiones para obtener datos de la VÍCTIMA
    INNER JOIN sys.dm_exec_sessions s_blocked 
        ON r.session_id = s_blocked.session_id
    OUTER APPLY sys.dm_exec_sql_text(r.sql_handle) t_blocked
    
    -- Unimos con sesiones para obtener datos del RESPONSABLE
    LEFT JOIN sys.dm_exec_sessions s_blocker 
        ON r.blocking_session_id = s_blocker.session_id
    -- Unimos con conexiones para saber qué fue lo último que ejecutó el bloqueador
    LEFT JOIN sys.dm_exec_connections c_blocker 
        ON s_blocker.session_id = c_blocker.session_id
    OUTER APPLY sys.dm_exec_sql_text(c_blocker.most_recent_sql_handle) t_blocker

    WHERE r.blocking_session_id <> 0
    ORDER BY r.wait_time DESC;
END
ELSE
BEGIN 
    -- Se devuelven las mismas columnas vacías si no hay bloqueos
    SELECT 
        '' AS 'Sesion Bloqueada',
        '' AS 'Usuario Bloqueado',
        '' AS 'Servidor Bloqueado',
        '' AS 'App Bloqueada',
        '' AS 'Base de Datos',
        '' AS 'Segundos Activa',
        '' AS 'Tipo de Espera',
        '' AS 'Consulta Bloqueada',
        '' AS 'Sesion Bloqueadora',
        '' AS 'Usuario Bloqueador',
        '' AS 'Servidor Bloqueador',
        '' AS 'App Bloqueadora',
        '' AS 'Estado Bloqueador',
        '' AS 'Ultima Consulta Bloqueador';
END

IF EXISTS(
    SELECT 1
    FROM sys.dm_tran_active_snapshot_database_transactions AS ast
    JOIN sys.dm_tran_active_transactions AS at ON at.transaction_id = ast.transaction_id
    JOIN sys.dm_exec_sessions AS ses ON ses.session_id = ast.session_id
    JOIN sys.dm_exec_connections AS con ON con.session_id = ses.session_id
    WHERE ast.elapsed_time_seconds > 0
    --AND ses.program_name <> 'Microsoft JDBC Driver for SQL Server'
    AND ses.program_name LIKE '%jTDS%'
)
BEGIN
    SELECT TOP 10 
        ses.session_id AS [Session ID],
        DB_NAME(database_id) AS [Database Name],
        CASE at.transaction_state
            WHEN 0 THEN 'init'
            WHEN 1 THEN 'init'
            WHEN 2 THEN 'active'
            WHEN 3 THEN 'ended'
            WHEN 4 THEN 'committing'
            WHEN 6 THEN 'committed'
            WHEN 7 THEN 'rolling back'
            ELSE 'other'
        END AS [Transaction State],
		FORMAT(at.transaction_begin_time, 'dd/MM/yy  -  HH:mm:ss') AS [Transaction Start Time],
        ast.elapsed_time_seconds AS [Elapsed Time],
        CASE 
            WHEN at.transaction_type = 1 THEN 'Read/Write'
            WHEN at.transaction_type = 2 THEN 'Read-Only'
            ELSE 'System'
        END AS [Transaction Type],
        ses.login_name AS [Login],
        ses.program_name AS [Origin Program],
        con.client_net_address AS [Client IP],
        ses.host_name AS [Host Name]
    FROM sys.dm_tran_active_snapshot_database_transactions AS ast
    JOIN sys.dm_tran_active_transactions AS at ON at.transaction_id = ast.transaction_id
    JOIN sys.dm_exec_sessions AS ses ON ses.session_id = ast.session_id
    JOIN sys.dm_exec_connections AS con ON con.session_id = ses.session_id
 WHERE ast.elapsed_time_seconds > 0
    --AND ses.program_name <> 'Microsoft JDBC Driver for SQL Server'
    AND ses.program_name LIKE '%jTDS%'
    ORDER BY at.transaction_begin_time 
END
ELSE
BEGIN 
    SELECT 
        '' AS [Session ID],
        '' AS [Database Name],
        '' AS [Transaction State],
        '' AS [Transaction Start Time],
        '' AS [Elapsed Time],
        '' AS [Transaction Type],
        '' AS [Login],
        '' AS [Origin Program],
        '' AS [Client IP],
        '' AS [Host Name]
END

-- CPU ALTO
SELECT TOP 10
    conn.session_id              AS SesionID,
    sess.login_name              AS Usuario,
    sess.host_name               AS HostName,
    sess.program_name            AS Programa,
    DB_NAME(req.database_id)     AS BaseDatos,

    sess.status                  AS EstadoSesion,
    req.status                   AS EstadoRequest,
    --req.command                  AS Comando,

    --req.wait_type                AS TipoEspera,
    req.wait_time                AS Espera_ms,

    req.cpu_time                 AS CPU_ms,
    req.logical_reads            AS LecturasLogicas,

    --conn.net_transport           AS TransporteRed,
    conn.client_net_address      AS IP_Cliente,
    conn.connect_time            AS HoraInicio,

    LEFT(REPLACE(sqltext.text, CHAR(10), ' '), 300) AS Consulta
FROM sys.dm_exec_connections conn
JOIN sys.dm_exec_sessions sess 
    ON conn.session_id = sess.session_id
LEFT JOIN sys.dm_exec_requests req  
    ON conn.session_id = req.session_id
OUTER APPLY sys.dm_exec_sql_text(req.sql_handle) AS sqltext
WHERE req.session_id IS NOT NULL
  AND req.cpu_time > 0
ORDER BY req.cpu_time DESC, req.wait_time DESC;
